name: Cedar Woods Properties Limited
analysis: CWP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$7.0100, stop A$6.2667, target A$7.7200 (0.96:1) — then trail it.
